title: Agent Loop
description:
Everything about a single agent's execution: the provider loop, streaming, tool execution, yield/resume, start/stop, restart recovery, JSONL repair, image handling.

Sub-domains:
- **OpenAI Provider**: Responses API, Chat Completions, model compatibility
- (future) **Lifecycle**: start, stop, resume, restart, JSONL repair
- (future) **Runtime**: streaming, tool execution, image handling, compaction
